channel.title: Automation on Himalaya's Dev Journal
channel.description: Recent content in Automation on Himalaya's Dev Journal

item.title: Setting Up CI/CD for a Hugo Blog
item.description: Automating builds, previews, and deployments for my personal site using GitHub Actions.

item.title: Cross-platform dotfiles using chezmoi
item.description: A portable dotfile setup automated with chezmoi, enabling consistent configuration across machines. Includes templating, secrets handling, and reproducible environment setup.
